== Notes for [[Item:Q98214|Q98214]] ==

Exilarch Abba ben Ukba beni David was Exilarch (Exilarch [Hebrew: ראש גלות Rosh Galut, Aramaic: ריש גלותא Reish Galuta lit. "head of the exile", Greek: Æchmalotarcha], referring to the leaders of the Diaspora Jewish community following the deportation of the population of Judah into Babylonian exile after the destruction of the kingdom of Judah) in Babylonia between 350 and 370.

See "My Lines"

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p106.htm#i12969 )

from Compiler: R. B. Stewart, Evans, GA

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/index.htm )
--------------------
Abba Abra Mar Exilarch at BABYLON

0300 - 0370

* BIRTH: 0300

* DEATH: 0370

Father: Nathan Ukba II, Exilarch at BABYLON

Family 1 :

1. +Kahani I Exilarch at BABYLON

http://www.afn.org/~lawson/d0001/g0000024.html#I2631

--------------------
Mar Abba Abra,

birth 300, died 370,

occupation: Exilarch Bavel 350-370, son of Mar Ukba III Nathan and nn

He was Exilarch of the Jews in Babylon about 350-370.

Sources:

1. Stuart, R.W. "Royalty for Commoners" line 329.

2. ..., "Encyclopedia Judiaca", Vol.6, pp.1024-1025.

3. ..., "The Jewish Enclyclopedia" Vol.V, pp.288-290.

He is perhaps the father of King Yezdegird's wife to: nn

Son :

1) Nathan to: nn

2) Mar Kahana, occupation: Exilarch 400-415 to: nn

3) Soshandukht bar Abba, birth ± 355 to: Yazdagrid , birth ± 355 Persia, died 412

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Abba-Mar-ben-Ukba/6000000002187920079?through=6000000000437013521

Exilarch Abba ben Ukba beni David was Exilarch (Exilarch [Hebrew: ראש גלות Rosh Galut, Aramaic: ריש גלותא Reish Galuta lit. "head of the exile", Greek: Æchmalotarcha], referring to the leaders of the Diaspora Jewish community following the deportation of the population of Judah into Babylonian exile after the destruction of the kingdom of Judah) in Babylonia between 350 and 370.

See "My Lines"

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p106.htm#i12969 )

from Compiler: R. B. Stewart, Evans, GA

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/index.htm ) <nowiki>--------------------</nowiki> Abba Abra Mar Exilarch at BABYLON

0300 - 0370

* BIRTH: 0300

* DEATH: 0370

Father: Nathan Ukba II, Exilarch at BABYLON

Family 1 :

1. +Kahani I Exilarch at BABYLON

http://www.afn.org/~lawson/d0001/g0000024.html#I2631

-------------------- Mar Abba Abra,

birth 300, died 370,

occupation: Exilarch Bavel 350-370, son of Mar Ukba III Nathan and nn

He was Exilarch of the Jews in Babylon about 350-370.

Sources:

1. Stuart, R.W. "Royalty for Commoners" line 329.

2. ..., "Encyclopedia Judiaca", Vol.6, pp.1024-1025.

3. ..., "The Jewish Enclyclopedia" Vol.V, pp.288-290.

He is perhaps the father of King Yezdegird's wife to: nn

Son :

1) Nathan to: nn

2) Mar Kahana, occupation: Exilarch 400-415 to: nn

3) Soshandukht bar Abba, birth ± 355 to: Yazdagrid , birth ± 355 Persia, died 412

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per03178.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
Exilarch (lay head) of Jews in Babylon 350-370

He was Exilarch in Baghdad from 350 to 370.

He was Exilarch in Baghdad from 350 to 370.

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Israeli Exilarch

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Israeli Exilarch

Exilarch is a title. Name unknown. See Wikipedia entry for Bahram V, that states that Bahram's mother was "Soshandukht, the daughter of the Jewish Exilarch". According to Wikipedia, "Exilarch", possibilities include Abba, Nathan, Mar Kahana, Huna IV, and Mar Zutra.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFB98AE1F1EFBBF89829A6488A4D95C7
geni:6000000002187920079

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
